data.name: Secret Sexy Streamer
data.detailed_description:
You've been in love with a mysterious streamer for years. She never showed her face, but you've always fantasized about having sex with her…

One day at work, you hear that same voice on a video call... but there are two suspects.

They work in another city and need a volunteer to work with them for a whole month…

Both have the same voice as your favorite streamer... and both want to fuck you.

For four weeks, you'll have to investigate which one is the mysterious streamer while your coworkers seek you out for sex.

But be careful: if you decide too soon or one of them finds out you're having sex with the other, you might lose your chance to discover the truth.

Meet your new coworkers:

🎤 Astra

Shy and extremely professional at work... until you discover that in bed she loves to cosplay and is much more perverted than you imagined.

🎸 Muna

Energetic and shameless. She says what she thinks regardless of consequences, and if she wants to fuck you, she will… no matter where you are or who might see you.

Each week you'll spend time with one of them, gathering clues while the sexual tension builds…

Will you discover who the mysterious streamer is before you run out of time?

  • Finally: animations! Some girls feature a special animated scene.

  • Visual Novel++ Format: each girl has different arcs that complete her own story.

  • No censorship! We’ve removed censorship from the images (we will add an option later to enable it if preferred).

  • Gallery: fill an image album as you progress through the story and revisit completed chapters.

  • Choose the girl: decide which girl to follow as the story unfolds.

  • Flashback: go back at any time to change a decision or relive a moment.

  • Smooth navigation: choose whether text advances automatically or skip it to reach your favorite part.

  • Immersive audio: includes music, sound effects, voices, and "other effects." Adjust volume independently or mute everything.

PLEASE NOTE

  • All characters depicted in this game are over 18 years old, and no real or identifiable minors were used in its production.

  • Help us out! If you think you can improve the narrative in your language, feel free to send us your suggestions via email or message us on our Steam page.

  • We’re still working on it: all improvements and new content will be added to the game at no additional cost.

data.short_description: You've been in love with a mysterious streamer for years, and your new coworkers have her voice... You move in with them for a month for work, and both want to fuck you, but you need to find out which one is the mystery girl. Will you discover the truth before it's too late?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 法文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間
